name: Easy Payday Loans
description_short: San Diego's Easy Payday Loans at 4250 University Ave offers quick cash solutions open 24/7.
description_long:
Easy Payday Loans operates a standalone storefront at 4250 University Ave in San Diego, CA, providing accessible financial services in a busy commercial corridor. The location is open 24 hours daily, 7 days a week, so you can access cash loans whenever you need them—early morning, late night, or during the weekend.

At this San Diego location, the team can help you apply for payday loans, title loans, and cash advances with minimal wait times. You'll need to bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a bank account statement to start the application process.

If you're facing an unexpected expense or short-term cash shortage in San Diego, CA, this location offers a quick alternative to traditional banking. Hours run 24/7, so you can stop by whenever it's convenient. Bring your required documents and expect to walk out with answers within the same business day.
pros: Offers same-day or next-day funding for approved applicants
Serves borrowers with bad credit who may not qualify for traditional bank loans
Online application process eliminates need to visit physical location
Operates across multiple California cities with established service locations
Direct deposit to borrower's bank account for convenient fund access
Accepts applications from employed individuals with steady income verification
cons: Does not disclose APR rates or specific interest costs on website
Website content is poorly written with confusing repetitive language and unclear explanations
No information about loan repayment terms, default consequences, or renewal policies
No mention of FDIC insurance, licensing, or regulatory compliance verification
High-risk lending model typical of payday loans with potentially predatory terms
best_for: Employed individuals facing urgent unexpected expenses who need cash within 24 hours
California residents with poor credit scores unable to qualify for personal bank loans
Borrowers with active bank accounts seeking direct deposit convenience
diagnosis: Easy Payday Loans targets employed California residents facing sudden financial emergencies who cannot access traditional bank loans due to credit issues or timing constraints. The primary caveat is the complete lack of transparent pricing disclosure—borrowers cannot determine actual APR, fees, or total cost of borrowing before applying, which is a standard red flag in payday lending and warrants careful comparison shopping with alternatives including credit union PALs or community lender options under 36% APR.
services: Direct deposit to borrower bank accounts
Consolidate debt services (mentioned but not detailed)
meta_description: San Diego Easy Payday Loans at 4250 University Ave, CA. Get cash loans 24 hours daily.
